Quotation Maker

Al Madhi letterhead quotation — tap any text on the sheet to edit it

Red × buttons remove a row/column (they never print). Everything on the sheet is editable — company, address, products, terms, even the labels. Your edits auto-save on this device.

Delivery Notes

Delivery notes linked to sales invoices

DN No.Linked InvoiceDateCustomerPO No.ItemsAction
Sales · Fulfilment

Create Delivery Note

Select an invoice once and the date, customer profile and delivery quantities are brought in automatically—without rates or amounts.

Delivery note numberDO-AMC-XXXX-YY
1Invoice source
Choose the invoice that this delivery fulfils
Ready to auto-fillInvoice date, customer and Description · Unit · Quantity
2Customer & delivery
Imported from the customer profile; still editable when needed
3Delivery items
Rate and Amount are intentionally excluded · Maximum 20 items
DescriptionUnitQtyRemarksDel
4Notes & confirmation
Shown on the printed delivery note

Auto-fill checklist

1
Select an invoiceChoose from recent Sales invoices.
2
Review imported detailsDate, full customer profile and delivery quantities are copied.
3
Add delivery logisticsVehicle, driver and receiver remain delivery-specific.

One-action printing

After saving, open the Delivery Note and choose whether to print it alone or together with its linked invoice.

Pricing stays private here.
Rates and amounts are never copied into Delivery Note lines.

Export Data
Backup & Restore

CSV files open in Excel. Backup saves everything as one JSON file. Restore overwrites cloud data (a safety copy downloads first).

Delete All Cheques

This permanently deletes every cheque in the register. This cannot be undone. Enter your app password to confirm.

Party / Vendor
Edit Details
Fill English and Urdu details separately. English statement will show English details, Urdu statement will show Urdu details.
🏢 Company / Business
📞 Contact & TRN
📍 Address
💳 Credit & Terms
Credit Days sets each invoice's due date (invoice date + days) and the "Due in / Overdue" status shown on statements. Leave blank for no terms.
